items: Many blue dragon scales, scattered about the dragon spawns.

groundItems.notes: [edit | edit source] The cove has multiple spawns of seaweed scattered around it. There are several rope and plank spawns around the cove, as well as single spawns of a big fishing net and small fishing net respectively. Two piles of bones spawn in the general vicinity of the cove.

items: Many blue dragon scales, scattered about the dragon spawns.
A gold bar, a gold ore, a ruby ring, a brass necklace, and 225 coins spawn in the basement of the Varrock west bank.
2 buckets spawn on the second floor of the Varrock Castle, and a pie dish spawns in the castle kitchen.
A leather body spawns in the building next to Aubury's Rune Shop, and a jug spawns by the nearby tea seller.
6 logs can be found in Varrock, four in the sawmill and two in the Daddy's Home building.
A pot spawns in the back of the Blue Moon Inn, a thread kitchen of the Jolly Boar Inn, and a body rune spawns just outside the eastern entrance to the Grand Exchange
